dax: Total Sales = SUM ( Sales[SalesAmount] )
Order Count = DISTINCTCOUNT ( Sales[OrderNumber] )
Total Quantity = SUM ( Sales[Quantity] )
Active Customers = DISTINCTCOUNT ( Sales[CustomerKey] )
Average Unit Price = AVERAGE ( Sales[UnitPrice] )
Sales YTD = TOTALYTD ( [Total Sales], 'Date'[Date] )
Sales PY = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR ( 'Date'[Date] ) )
Sales YoY % = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales] - [Sales PY], [Sales PY] )
Sales MTD = TOTALMTD ( [Total Sales], 'Date'[Date] )
Rolling 3M Sales = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], DATESINPERIOD ( 'Date'[Date], MAX ( 'Date'[Date] ), -3, MONTH ) )
Gross Margin % = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales] - [Total Cost], [Total Sales] )
Sales per Customer = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales], [Active Customers] )
% of Total Sales = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales], CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], ALL ( Product ) ) )
Return Rate = DIVIDE ( [Returned Quantity], [Total Quantity] )
Average Order Value = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales], [Order Count] )
Sales (Line Level) = SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Weighted Avg Price = DIVIDE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ), SUM ( Sales[Quantity] ) )
Total Margin = SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost] ) )
Largest Line Total = MAXX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
High-Value Customers = COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), [Total Sales] > 10000 ) )
Product Rank by Sales = RANKX ( ALL ( Product[ProductName] ), [Total Sales], , DESC )
Top 5 Products Sales = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], TOPN ( 5, ALL ( Product[ProductName] ), [Total Sales], DESC ) )
Customer Sales Rank = RANKX ( ALLSELECTED ( Customer[CustomerName] ), [Total Sales], , DESC, DENSE )
Is Top 10 Product = IF ( [Product Rank by Sales] <= 10, 1, 0 )
Region Rank = RANKX ( ALL ( 'Geography'[Region] ), [Total Sales], , DESC )
Sales (All Products) = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], ALL ( Product ) )
Online Sales = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], Sales[Channel] = "Online" )
Sales Excl Returns = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], Sales[OrderStatus] <> "Returned" )
Sales (Keep High Value) = CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], KEEPFILTERS ( Sales[SalesAmount] > 1000 ) )
Category Share = DIVIDE ( [Total Sales], CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], ALLEXCEPT ( Product, Product[Category] ) ) )
